subcodes.first_line: O thou whom I remember on this dark night, the night of the Ascension, when sorrows did sorely oppress me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اذکرک فی هذه اللیله الدهماء لیله الصعود التی اشتدت الاحزان علی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah
